nasb.text: “Take him and look after him, and do nothing harmful to him, but rather deal with him just as he tells you.”

esv.text: “Take him, look after him well, and do him no harm, but deal with him as he tells you.”

cnv.text: “你把他帶去，好好照顧他，切不可傷害他；他對你怎樣說，你就給他照辦。”

ccb.text: “你好好照顾耶利米，切不可伤害他。他有什么要求，你都要满足。”
